scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,py -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter @workspace/frontend dev" "pnpm run backend"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n web,py,api -c blue,magenta,green "pnpm --filter @workspace/frontend dev" "pnpm run backend" "pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev"
scripts.build:workspace: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./frontend" --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
